Translation.Text:
TruAbutment DS CAD-CAM Attachment Library for T:LOC® and All-on-T®
TruAbutment DS CAD-CAM Attachment Library is used to create individualized digital solutions for both the removable (T:LOC®) and fixed (All-on-T®) denture prosthetics. The T:LOC® attachment is used to design and fabricate full titanium custom-angled locator abutment using compatible Locator™ attachment data. The All-on-T® attachment is used to design and fabricate full titanium custom-angled multi-unit abutment using compatible NobelBiocare™ stock MUA attachment data. Both solutions provide greater precision and convenience for the end user by maintaining optimal gingival height, providing ideal emergence profile, and easily designing parallel passes.
Only use this locator attachment data with TruAbutment Inc. custom abutment library for EXOCAD. Please contact us at +1 714 956 1488 or visit us at http://www.truabutment.com for installation and Instruction for Use.
Warning: These custom-angled locators are designed to be milled by TruAbutment Inc. TruAbutment Inc. does not assume any liability for the quality and safety of the locator abutments that are not manufactured by TruAbutment Inc.
TruAbutment Inc. is a registered Trademark.
